title: Одиссей и сирены — системы против отвлечений
style: Flat minimalist vector mascot style, same character design, proportions, dark teal background and warm palette as the reference image(s). Vertical 9:16, full body, centered, no text, clean bold shapes.

scenes.image: the mortal youth steering a small wooden boat across the sea toward a glowing goal on the horizon, his little flame creature burning bright on the mast
scenes.motion: the boat rocks gently on the waves, the little flame flickers, the goal glows ahead
scenes.caption: Ты плывёшь к цели

scenes.image: cartoon sirens shaped like glowing smartphones and video feeds with tempting faces, rising from the waves singing and luring the mortal off course, he turns his head toward them
scenes.motion: the siren-phones sway and glow seductively, the mortal turns toward them tempted
scenes.vo: Сирены поют: «Один ролик… одна лента… всего минутку».
scenes.caption: «Один ролик… одна лента…»

scenes.image: Athena the wise goddess in a helmet points firmly at the boat's mast, instructing the mortal to tie himself to it; ropes ready, calm strategic expression
scenes.motion: Athena points decisively, the mortal nods, ropes lift toward the mast
scenes.vo: Афина: «Силой воли не выстоишь. Привяжи себя к мачте».
scenes.caption: Поставь систему, а не волю

scenes.image: the mortal tied to the mast with rope, calmly sailing straight past the defeated sirens toward the glowing goal, his little flame creature now burning big and bright
scenes.motion: the boat sails steadily past the sirens, the flame grows brighter, the goal nears
scenes.vo: Связал себя — заблокировал отвлечения — и проплыл мимо. Системы сильнее силы воли.
scenes.caption: Системы сильнее силы воли
